✦ Kings Restoration Ministries International ✦

✦ Who We Are

A Community
Built on Faith

Kings Restoration Ministries International – Sanctuary of Praise Our Mandate speaks of Restoration in all facets of human existence.We focus mainly on destinies that have been afflicted,beaten,tattered and subsequently in groaning and agonies as a result of pains,pangs and crying that’s in the mandate.

✝

Restoration

Our mission is to lead people to become fully devoted followers of Christ.

♪

Praise & Worship

Heartfelt worship is at the centre of everything we do — every Sunday is a celebration.

✦

Community

We are an international family, welcoming people from every nation and background.

✝
✦ Gather & Worship

Sunday Service

Every Sunday we come together to worship, receive the Word, and grow as a community rooted in faith, love, and restoration. All are welcome — come as you are.

Service Hours

10:30
to
13:00

Every Sunday Morning

Day

Sunday — weekly gathering

Duration

Approximately 2½ hours of worship, teaching & fellowship

Language

Service held in English — all nations are welcome

Dress Code

Come as you are — no dress code required

✦ Wherever You Are

Watch Us Live

Can't make it in person? We broadcast every Sunday service live on Facebook and YouTube so you can worship with us from anywhere in the world.

Facebook Live

Join our Sunday livestream directly on Facebook. Interact with fellow members in the comments and share the message with your friends and family around the world.

Live every Sunday Follow us →

YouTube Live

Stream our services on YouTube and access our growing archive of past sermons, worship sessions, and special events — available to watch anytime, anywhere.

Live every Sunday Subscribe →
✦ Find Us

Our Location

We gather every Sunday in the heart of Milan. We'd love to welcome you in person — all are invited.

Milan, 20142

Milano, Lombardia — Italy
